content:
I Cant Hold Back by Survivor-- 
I substitute [ch]Asus2[/ch] x02200 for the A at times

[Intro] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]

now its time to trade those dreams[/tab]

reaching out to both of us[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch] 
This love affair can't wait[/tab]
